title: Classes and Objects
description:
Java is object-oriented. Classes define blueprints, objects are instances.

Fix the Person class: add a constructor, fix the getter methods, and create an object properly.
objectives: Fix getter methods to return correct values
hints: Constructor has the same name as the class and no return type.
Use 'this.field = parameter' to assign values in constructor.

checks.failMessage: Constructor should not have 'void' return type.
Use 'this.name = name' to assign the parameter to the field.
getName should return the name field, not a string literal.
Use 'new Person(...)' to create an object.
